name: Device Monitor²
description: L'app gratuita e privacy-first per monitorare RAM, CPU, GPU, BATTERIA, NETWORK e SENSORI su iPhone, iPad, Apple Watch e Mac.
description_en: The free, privacy-first app for monitoring RAM, CPU, GPU, BATTERY, NETWORK and SENSORS on iPhone, iPad, Apple Watch and Mac.

name: iWindrose²
tagline: La rosa dei venti sempre con te
tagline_en: The wind rose, always with you
description: L'app per gli appassionati del mare: rosa dei venti, previsioni meteo, bollettini marini, maree, scale e molto altro su iPhone, iPad e Apple Watch.
description_en: The app for sea enthusiasts: wind rose, weather forecasts, marine bulletins, tides, scales and much more on iPhone, iPad and Apple Watch.
